subcodes.title: PALATAISO
subcodes.first_line:
## PALATAISO

E faka-aloalogia a Koe, O te Aliki toku Atua!  Ko oti a Koe, i Tou Palataiso tafasili i te maluga, ne faka
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from BH02462 — Header 'PALATAISO', opens like AB00089 (Paradise prayer); correct tvl at pm_1031
